# shelly_serial_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The ID of the Serial component instance.
- `ip` (String) The IP address of the Shelly device.

### Optional

- `mode` (String) Operating mode for the serial port. Supported modes are listed in the modes attribute.
